items.headline: Delta Air Lines (DAL) Stock After 79% One-Year Rally Are Valuation Hopes Still Realistic
items.summary: If you are wondering whether Delta Air Lines at around US$83 per share offers fair value or a margin of safety, the answer depends on how you look at the stock. The share price has returned 4.6% over the past week, 16.9% over the last 30 days, 20.3% year to date, 78.7% over 1 year, 100.6% over 3 years and 90.9% over 5 years, which naturally raises questions about how much of the story is already priced in. items.headline: What is the impact of the World Cup on the U.S. economy?
items.summary: Investing.com -- Goldman Sachs estimates the 2026 FIFA World Cup could provide a temporary boost to U.S. employment, consumer spending, and inflation over the coming months, with the largest effects expected to appear in June.
